title: 缬草
content_json: [{"key":"0.61276041660352516","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1134/h_576/50364/103682/2024/9/25/781929.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_956/h_710/50364/103682/2024/9/25/583577.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.2901012303f4a","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者草，身份编码E07-062012，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"看起来不太靠谱的无证医师，由于特殊原因，陷入睡眠的时间总是多于清醒的时间，总是一副慵懒、颓废的样子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很怕麻烦，为此会减少不必要的交际，习惯了一个人生活，时常会自言自语。有时会用若无其事的口吻说出一些相当可怕的内容。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"对精神医学和催眠学说有很高的研究热情，并为此进行了许多秘密的实验。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身为医者，对所有生命都一视同仁，不会轻易放弃任何病人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"厌恶暴力，尤其厌恶E-07区时常爆发的帮派火拼，对于因此类事故上门求助的伤员，总是会恢复地比平常更痛苦。或许这是医师的无声反对。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data": ata":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【生死有命，应释怀。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"昏暗的重症监护室内，一个健壮的男人浑身插满导管，即使是再粗心的人也能看到，他的胸前被什么东西击穿了一个大洞，此刻正依靠复杂的机器「活着」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我不得不声明——」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「医生，请您救救我的哥哥。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"少女苦苦哀求，期待着奇迹的发生。缬草面色凝重地返回了手术室，思索着最佳治疗方案，然而所有的分析结果都显示，男人心脏损毁，就算依靠机械心脏存活，未来大概率也只能成为类似植物人的存在。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"于是缬草从地下室取回了那种特殊的「试剂」。在踏入手术室前，她深呼吸了三次，以平复纷乱的思绪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「拜托您—一」少女的哀求声被手术室的大门阻断。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草心里清楚，自己此行并非是要「救赎」，而是要……「安息」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"时间一分一秒过去，手术室内的仪器纷乱地响着，最终在同一个瞬间归于寂静。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哥哥……哥哥……哥哥！」少女的哭喊声响彻走廊，缬草面无表情的走到她身边，递给她一株植物。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是什么？我不要这个……我要我的哥哥·……」在嗅到植物散发出的气味以后，少女慢慢停止了哭喊，陷入了沉眠。缬草示意助手将少女安置到休息室中，自己则走向了种满花草的后院。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「所以您刚刚给了她什么？」助手好奇地问。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只是『缬草』。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【遇事不决，讲重点】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「滴滴滴—一」老旧的移动电话在乱糟糟的文件堆里响了起来。那堆文件里又突然伸出一只手，很快按下了接听键。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「时间地址几个人？」慵懒的女声响起，缬草用力揉了揉眼睛，努力让自己清醒一点。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「救救我——好多血——救命——」电话那头叫得惨烈。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「讲重点啊……真是。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我在E-07东边第二个街区的主干道中，央，就是——」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「知道了知道了。」缬草挂断电话，背起急救箱便出了门。刚刚求助的地点离她住处不远—一至少当她赶到现场时，一切都还有救。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「来先帮我按住他的脑袋，对··…就是那里。」缬草将绷带绕了一圈，极快地固定住了止血胶带。受伤的男人发出撕心裂肺的尖叫，她却充耳不闻，只是将一种植物塞进了他的嘴里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「吃点零食缓缓吧。」男人咽下那株植物后，很快便陷入了昏睡。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你给他吃了什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只是『缬草』。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【医疗咨询，请诚实。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「按照1-5的五个评分，1为最不符合，5为最符合，回答以下问题。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「近三个月以来，你感到情绪低落以及丧失自驱力。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"[1」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「最近两周食欲和之前一样好。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「5」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「半年内有稳定的作息。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「5」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「最近两周有过失眠的情况。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"[1」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草合上电脑，开始在病历上写着什么。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这地方以后就是你的住处了，你应该会开个诊所什么的吧？」举着烟斗的男人四下打量，最后冲着窗台上的盆栽吐了个烟圈。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯，开诊所的第一件事，就是『禁止任何人在室内吸烟』。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对了，既然许可你在此地行医，我还是得收点报酬，不然我这生意怕是要亏得一点不剩了。」男人完全没在意缬草的话，俯身从她的上衣口袋里抽走了一支钢笔。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这东西我拿走咯，我很喜欢。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草就这样目送那家伙离去，她想不明白他为什么会收留一个因医疗事故而被吊销资质的落魄医师。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「等等——请收下这个。」思考再三，缬草决定再送他一份礼物一一这也是基于刚刚的诊断得出的处方。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我对于精，神，药，物很有研究，如果你……或者你的朋友存在这方面的困扰，欢迎来找我。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「所以……你送我的是『精，神，药，品』？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只是『缬草』。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.ffbcf3de15a928","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"坦克，增益"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 115|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3生命加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"独特的免死和无敌，在兵祸本中有非常强力的表现，同时大招护盾和增益也让队伍能有更好的输出空间，推荐必练的一个角色"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.59e941a9f31b58","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12时光+6治愈+6灵子黑疫"}]}]}},{"key":"0.bc1706573b6ce8","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万圣节"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/7/18/619144.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"9DaucSiWvyu3HxdU","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
